title: [Call of the Wild]
description: Leafy fronds of verdant-colored leather drape across the bamboo-lined walls of the shop, partially shading the glass-paned enclosures interspersed between colorful terracotta pots.  Open cages of twisted brass wire are suspended at each of the corners, filled with grass-like shreds of wheat-colored threads and scraps of velvet spilling down across the tiled floor.  A scattering of well-worn pillows sit along the edges of the room, each one topped with a thick blanket of embroidered wool.
